_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Confirmed tubal pregnancy measuring less than 35 mm and no foetal heartbeat
Serum HCG levels of 1500 mIU/mL or less
Patient agrees to come for follow up

clinical_thresholds.note: on ultrasonography, with no foetal heartbeat

preauth.label: Detailed Clinical notes with history, symptoms, signs, examination findings, planned line of treatment, and advice for admission
Serum Beta human chorionic gonadotropin (hCG) titers
Culdocentesis – if ultrasound facility is not available (blood collection in pouch of douglas) (Optional)

claim.label: Serum Beta Hcg level follow-up for medical management
Blood transfusion notes (if blood transfusion was given)

ppd_preauth.q: Did clinical presentation, increased hCG levels, and USG report confirm the diagnosis?
Adnexal mass ≤ 3.5 cm in size on USG?

cpd_claim.q: Was the clinical presentation, investigations/imaging and management indicative of surgery as applicable?
Was serum hCG levels negative post medical management as applicable?

common_queries: Adnexal mass > 3.5 cm on USG without justification for medical management.
Fetal cardiac activity is present without justification for medical management.
B-hCG values > 1500 mIU/ml without justification for medical management.
Patient not hemodynamically stable without justification for medical management.
Contraindications to Methotrexate (Liver/Renal Disease, Anaemia, Breast feeding) present without justification for medical management.
Clinical presentation, hCG levels, or USG report did not confirm ectopic pregnancy diagnosis at pre-authorization.
Serum hCG levels not negative post medical management at claim stage.
Missing serum Beta hCG levels follow-up for medical management at claim submission.

additional_information.special_empanelment: Facilities with well-equipped operation theatre, anesthesia and anesthetist availability, laparoscopic facility for laparoscopic procedures.
clinical_key_pointers: Ectopic pregnancy is an implantation of fertilized ovum outside the uterine cavity, commonly the fallopian tube.
SITES: Tubes-commonest site, Ovaries, Cervical, Abdominal.

SYMPTOMS AND SIGNS: Unruptured ectopic pregnancy: Symptoms of early pregnancy there may be spotting, Abdominal and pelvic pain. Ruptured ectopic pregnancy: Acute Abdominal and pelvic pain, Collapse and Weakness, Pallor, Abdominal distension, Fast, weak pulse (110 per min. or more), Hypotension, Rebound tenderness.
If rupture is diagnosed or even suspected patient has to be rushed to nearest centre where surgery with blood transfusion if needed can be done.
